revision.comment: reduce repetition and reduce repetition when the template call uses |redirect= in the template call
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Hatnote|{{#if: {{{1|}}}|This article is about {{{1}}}.|}} {{#if: {{{redirect|}}}|"{{{redirect}}}" redirects here. For a definition of that {{{3|term}}}| For a definition of the {{{3|term}}} "{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}"}}, see the Wiktionary entry {{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[wikt:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]]|[[wikt:{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}]]}}.}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Hatnote|{{#if: {{{1|}}}|This article is about {{{1}}}.|}} {{#if: {{{redirect|}}}|"{{{redirect}}}" redirects here. For a definition of that {{{3|term}}}| For a definition of the {{{3|term}}} "{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}"}}, see the Wiktionary entry {{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[wikt:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]]|[[wikt:{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}]]}}.}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
